description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.13` extracts redeclared typed-RPC interfaces,
`executeAsync` lambdas, and DOM helpers from per-spec copies into
one canonical module. Once the expand step (`bsm-kia.13.1`)
lands, each spec can swap its local copy for an import one spec
at a time. Doing this in batches-sized-by-file keeps the suite
green between commits.

This sub-issue covers the migration for `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` only.

## What to build

Replace every local declaration of the affected interfaces,
lambdas, and helpers in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` with imports from
`e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts`. The spec's behavior and
assertions stay byte-for-byte equivalent; only the source of the
helpers changes.

## Technical Approach

- Add an import for `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` at the top of
  `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- Delete every local declaration of `interface
  WorkspaceSwitchResponse`, `interface WorkspaceStateResponse`,
  `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch`, `invokeWorkspaceState`,
  `issueRowSelector`, and `expectIssueVisible` in
  `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- Update any spec-local `arguments_: object` typed signature to
  match the helper's canonical signature (one signature across
  all callers â€” no `Record<string, unknown>` drift).
- Leave the WebDriverIO imports (`browser`, `$`) untouched.

## Considerations

- Local copies may have drifted from each other; pick the
  canonical signature from the helper module, not from any one
  spec.
- If the spec has type-only usages of an interface (e.g.,
  `Promise<WorkspaceSwitchResponse>`), keep them but import the
  type from the helper.
- The behavior, ordering, and assertion count in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
  must not change.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` imports the helpers from
      `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts`.
- [ ] No local declaration of any helper exported by
      `helpers/rpc.ts` remains in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- [ ] The spec's `it()` count, assertion count, and behavior
      match the previous version exactly.
- [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible" e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm exec ultracite check` â€” both must
  pass.
- Run the targeted scenario for this file:
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:success` for
    `issue-list.success.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:empty` for `issue-list.empty.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:atomic-switch` for
    `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:restoration` for
    `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove no scenario
  regression.
title: Migrate issue-list.restoration.spec.ts to helpers/rpc.ts
